notes: Same uid, two bodies — the MIRROR of the replace case. Here the EXISTING (resource A) is better: it streams the export and quotes fields per RFC-4180 with a passing eval, while the INCOMING (resource B) buffers the whole table in memory and emits unescaped fields (a correctness defect) with a stale/failing eval. The winner is the existing resource, so the incoming is dropped from admission — verdict KEEP. No catalog write and no human gate (keep stays within the judge's authority once calibrated, INV-6). This is the discriminating pair: same shape as replace, opposite winner — the judge must not default to 'newer wins'.
